exact_hq_location: 301, 3rd Floor, Plot No. 11A, Sanjona Complex, Next to Hotel Neel Kamal, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, 400071
industry_and_segment: Fin-Tech, Online Trading Platform, Investment Tools
no_of_users: 1.5 lakh+ registered users (prior to SEBI license) / 130k users (as of Jan 2025)
key_positioning: A next-generation stock trading app for India's youth, offering intuitive single-screen trading, data-driven insights, and behavioral feedback.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Navigating the highly competitive Indian stock trading market.
effect: Requires continuous innovation to differentiate.
Constant need to acquire and retain users.
Pressure to offer competitive pricing and features.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Scaling operations and technology to meet user growth.
effect: Demands significant investment in infrastructure.
Potential for service disruptions if scaling is not managed effectively.
Need for robust and efficient backend systems.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Reliance on SEBI regulations and compliance for brokerage services.
effect: Adds to operational overhead and costs.
Requires continuous monitoring of regulatory changes.
Potential for penalties or suspension if non-compliant.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Educating and attracting the target demographic (Gen Z and millennials) to use their platform.
effect: Requires tailored marketing strategies.
Need to build trust and credibility with a younger audience.
Competition from other platforms also targeting this demographic.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Balancing advanced analytics and features with user-friendliness for a young demographic.
effect: Risk of overwhelming new users with too much data.
Need for intuitive UI/UX design.
Constant A/B testing and user feedback loops required.

differentiators.feature: Actionable Insights: Data distilled into clear, focused signals that help users make smarter calls instantly.
effect: Helps users make quicker and more informed decisions.
Reduces the time spent on complex data analysis.
Empowers users with clear trading signals.

differentiators.feature: Custom Screeners: Ability to build, refine, and automate screeners tailored to individual trading styles.
effect: Allows for personalized stock discovery.
Caters to diverse trading strategies.
Enhances efficiency in finding investment opportunities.

differentiators.feature: Behavioral Feedback: Understanding trading patterns and providing insights to improve strategy over time.
effect: Helps users identify and correct poor trading habits.
Promotes self-improvement in trading skills.
Contributes to more disciplined investing.

differentiators.feature: Lightning-Fast Execution: Designed for speed to react to market movements.
effect: Minimizes slippage on trades.
Enables timely execution of time-sensitive strategies.
Improves overall trading performance.

differentiators.feature: Single-Screen Trading Experience: Intuitive interface for discovering stocks, trading, and portfolio management.
effect: Simplifies the trading process.
Reduces the learning curve for new users.
Provides a streamlined user experience.
Aligned identity with growing ambitions and broader mission.
Signaled commitment to innovation and wealth-tech.
Aimed to better resonate with Gen Z and millennial target audience.

strategic_moves.move: Securing SEBI License for NSE & BSE Brokerage Services
effect: Enabled direct brokerage services on major Indian exchanges.
Increased credibility and trustworthiness.
Expanded service offerings and revenue potential.
Provided capital for team expansion, technology development, and user experience enhancement.
Supported growth and scaling initiatives.
Increased runway for product development and market penetration.

strategic_moves.move: Focus on Youth-Oriented Features (e.g., behavioral insights, single-screen trading)
effect: Targets a specific and growing demographic in the Indian market.
Aims to differentiate from competitors by catering to unique needs of younger investors.
Fosters early adoption and brand loyalty among Gen Z and millennials.

strategic_moves.move: Developing advanced analytics and personalized portfolio features
effect: Enhances the platform's value proposition.
Attracts users seeking data-driven investment tools.
Supports users in making informed investment decisions.

milestones: Rebranded from TradeBook to Trackk in January 2025.
Raised $100K in pre-seed funding from Maahavir Ventures.
Raised $1M in seed funding in August 2025.
Secured SEBI license to operate brokerage services on NSE & BSE.
Amassed over 1.5 lakh registered users prior to obtaining full brokerage license.
Processed over 6,000 trades daily (prior to obtaining full brokerage license).
new_features_launched: Custom screeners with plain English input.
other_crucial_details: Trackk is a brand under which Tradebook Consultancy Services Private Limited offers its services.
The company is SEBI-registered as a Broker & Research Analyst.
Target audience: Gen Z and millennials.
The app has received high ratings on both Apple App Store (4.7/5) and Google Play Store (4.6/5).
Legal Name: Tradebook Consultancy Services Private Limited.
